federal.title: Application to Proceed In Forma Pauperis (28 USC §1915)
federal.court: United States District Court, Western District of Michigan
federal.form: AO 240 (Application to Proceed in District Court Without Prepaying Fees)

sections.heading: INSTRUCTIONS
content: Complete AO 240 form from uscourts.gov
Attach to F4 §1983 complaint
File via CM/ECF (PACER) or in person at USDC Grand Rapids
Court address: 399 Federal Building, 110 Michigan St NW, Grand Rapids, MI 49503

sections.heading: REQUIRED INFORMATION (Andrew to Complete)
content: [  ] Current monthly income from all sources
[  ] Current monthly expenses (rent, utilities, food, medical, transportation)
[  ] List of dependents (including L.D.W.)
[  ] Bank account balances
[  ] Vehicle value and loan balance
[  ] Any other assets or debts
[  ] Employment status and employer information
[  ] Any government assistance received (SNAP, Medicaid, SSI, etc.)

sections.heading: LEGAL STANDARD
content: 28 USC §1915(a)(1): Court may authorize proceeding without prepayment "if the person is unable to pay such fees or give security therefor."
Standard: Not destitution, but inability to pay fees without depriving self or dependents of necessities.
Adkins v E.I. DuPont de Nemours & Co., 335 US 331 (1948)

michigan_circuit.title: Application to Waive Fees — MC 20
michigan_circuit.filing: F1, F2, F3, F7 — Circuit Court filings

sections.heading: INSTRUCTIONS
content: Download MC 20 from courts.michigan.gov/scao-forms
One MC 20 covers ALL filings in same case number
File with first circuit court filing (F1 recommended)
If approved, covers F2, F3, F7 in same case

sections.heading: AUTO-FILLED FIELDS
content: Plaintiff: Andrew James Pigors
Address: 1977 Whitehall Road, Lot 17, North Muskegon, MI 49445
Court: 14th Circuit Court, Muskegon County
Judge: Hon. Jenny L. McNeill

sections.heading: REQUIRED INFORMATION (Andrew to Complete)
content: [  ] Monthly income
[  ] Monthly expenses
[  ] Dependents
[  ] Whether receiving public assistance (MCL 600.2963)
[  ] Bank balances
[  ] Sign and date under oath

michigan_coa.title: Application to Waive Fees — Court of Appeals

sections.heading: INSTRUCTIONS
content: Use MC 20 form, mark Court of Appeals
File with application for leave (F8) or opening brief (F9)
COA 366810 already filed — check if fee was paid or waived
If fee already paid for 366810, may need separate MC 20 for F8 (new application)

michigan_msc.title: Application to Waive Fees — Michigan Supreme Court
michigan_msc.case: New case number assigned on filing
michigan_msc.filing: F5 — MSC Complaint for Superintending Control

sections.heading: INSTRUCTIONS
content: Use MC 20 form, mark Supreme Court
File with F5 complaint for superintending control
MSC Clerk: PO Box 30052, Lansing, MI 48909
E-file via TrueFiling (trufiling.com/michigan-supreme-court)

sections.heading: NOTE
content: JTC complaints are FREE — no filing fee required
Mail to: 3034 W Grand Blvd, Ste 8-450, Detroit, MI 48202
Or email: jtc@jtc.courts.mi.gov
